title: Update and refresh your bathroom in just 4 quick steps
description: PROPERTY NEWS - If your bathroom is not...
bodyText:
PROPERTY NEWS - If your bathroom is not giving you spa vibes and needs a little TLC to give it an updated, fresh feel, then now is the time to make a change.

It could be as simple as changing your towels, shower curtain and taps, or as serious as adding that dreamy bath. Not sure where to start? These quick and easy tips from hansgrohe are here to help:


> Make it work for you:


Think about how you currently use your bathroom and what improvements would make the biggest difference. Do you crave a spa-like experience with a luxurious shower head?  Does your family need more storage space? Start by making a list of your priorities.

Define your scope: Once you know your needs, decide on the level of renovation you’re comfortable with.  A “facelift” can involve simple updates like painting, adding new mixers, or replacing light fixtures.  A more extensive renovation might involve installing a new shower system, vanity, or toilet.

Explore design inspiration: Browse online resources like Pinterest or magazines to gather ideas for styles, materials, and layouts.  For personalised guidance, try a Bathroom Planner to help you visualise your dream bathroom. Think about your colour palette during this process too – do you want to go neutral and calm, or add a splash of fun with a feature wall?

Simplicity at it's best: A bath with a view. Photo: Pexels


> Plan and budget:


With a clearer picture of your project, create a budget that considers materials, and labour, if necessary. We love the Renovation Whitepaper tool, which gives you valuable tips for planning and budgeting.

For more on homes, visit Get It Magazine.

Clever design and neat cupboard space. Photo: Pexels

Add a feature window to allow maximum light. Photo: Pexels

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
